macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US CPI Rises 0.6% in April 2026, Up 3.8% YoY
items.summary: The Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers increased 0.6 percent seasonally adjusted in April, with a 3.8 percent rise over the past 12 months. This marks ongoing inflationary pressures amid key economic data releases.

items.title: US Unemployment at 4.3% and Payrolls Add 115K in April
items.summary: April 2026 saw the unemployment rate hold at 4.3 percent while nonfarm payroll employment grew by 115,000. Average hourly earnings rose by $0.06, indicating steady but moderated labor market growth.

items.title: Producer Price Index Surges 1.4% in April 2026
items.summary: The Producer Price Index for Final Demand jumped 1.4 percent in April, signaling rising wholesale inflation. This follows other indicators of persistent price pressures in the economy.

items.title: ADP Employment Change Forecast at 99K for Latest Report
items.summary: Upcoming ADP Employment Change data is expected at 99K, with prior at 109K, ahead of broader labor market releases. This private payroll figure often previews official jobs data.

items.title: Brookings Analyzes Limited Economic Damage from Trump Tariffs
items.summary: New tariff hikes in the second Trump administration have been historic in scale but have not significantly harmed the economy so far, according to Brookings Institution analysis. The measures exceed those from the first term.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: $YILONGMA Surges 610% to Lead Crypto Gainers Amid Market Dip
items.summary: Chinese Elon Musk token $YILONGMA skyrocketed 610.87% to $0.3578, topping gainers alongside $WARD (up 495%) and $MAGA (up 396%), while overall crypto market cap fell to $2.7T with Bitcoin and Ethereum declining.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Top $230M, Mostly Long Positions
items.summary: The crypto futures market saw over $230M in liquidations in the past 24 hours, with Bitcoin at $106.93M (90.94% longs), Ethereum $95.14M (89.54% longs), and Solana $27.78M (93.11% longs), signaling sharp sell-side pressure.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops 2.3% to $79,300 After Hot PPI Data, Hits 200-Day MA
items.summary: Bitcoin slipped 2.3% to $79,300 following hot Producer Price Index data, testing the 200-day moving average at $82,400, which analysts call a major bear market signal.

items.title: 3 Bearish Signals in Crypto: Open Interest Drops $1.25B Amid Rising Inflation
items.summary: Major crypto exchanges saw open interest fall by nearly $1.25B, compounded by rising inflation undermining bullish narratives, per CryptoQuant data.

items.title: Elon Musk Testimony: Microsoft Spent Over $100B on OpenAI
items.summary: In a lawsuit testimony, Elon Musk revealed Microsoft has invested more than $100B cumulatively in its OpenAI collaboration.

items.title: Aave Moves 25K rsETH via LayerZero to Resume Cross-Chain Bridging
items.summary: Aave transferred 25K $rsETH to the Ethereum mainnet-based LayerZero OFT adapter, officially resuming cross-chain bridging capabilities.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Introduces Gemini Intelligence for Proactive Android Experience
items.summary: Google has unveiled Gemini Intelligence, an AI-powered update for Android devices that enables advanced automation, intelligent form filling, natural voice refinement, and custom widgets. It rolls out first on select Samsung Galaxy and Google Pixel smartphones, aiming to make devices anticipate user needs while prioritizing privacy.

items.title: Meta Hires Four More Researchers from OpenAI
items.summary: Meta has recruited OpenAI researchers Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren, according to a report citing a person familiar with the hires. This continues the talent competition in AI between major tech companies.

items.title: Valid Systems Launches AI Fraud Detection Integration on Snowflake AI Data Cloud
items.summary: Valid Systems announced a new integration on Snowflake's AI Data Cloud, enabling financial institutions to deploy AI and machine learning models for real-time deposit fraud checks. The platform processes over 70 million transactions and $6 billion in funds monthly, making enterprise-grade tools accessible to smaller banks and fintechs.

items.title: ProPublica Journalists Strike Over AI Workforce Concerns
items.summary: ProPublica staff staged a 24-hour walkout highlighting tensions around AI integration, demanding contractual protections against algorithmic tools that could lead to layoffs or erode editorial trust. The strike drew widespread support and reflects broader industry shifts toward AI governance in newsrooms.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
